ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.description:
wkhtmltopdf and wkhtmltoimage are open source (LGPLv3) command line tools
to render HTML into PDF and various image formats using the Qt WebKit rendering engine.
about.summary: Command line tools to render HTML into PDF and various image formats.

about.description:
wkhtmltopdf and wkhtmltoimage are open source (LGPLv3) command line tools
to render HTML into PDF and various image formats using the Qt WebKit rendering engine.
about.summary: Command line tools to render HTML into PDF and various image formats.

name: wkhtmltopdf
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "wkhtmltopdf" %}
{% set major_minor = "0.12" %}
{% set version = major_minor + ".4" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  fn: wkhtmltox-{{ version }}_linux-generic-amd64.tar.xz  # [linux]
  url: https://github.com/{{ name }}/{{ name }}/releases/download/{{ version }}/wkhtmltox-{{ version }}_linux-generic-amd64.tar.xz  # [linux]
  sha256: 049b2cdec9a8254f0ef8ac273afaf54f7e25459a273e27189591edc7d7cf29db  # [linux]

  fn: wkhtmltox-{{ version }}_msvc2015-win64.exe  # [win]
  url: https://github.com/{{ name }}/{{ name }}/releases/download/{{ version }}/wkhtmltox-{{ version }}_msvc2015-win64.exe  # [win]
  sha256: 14a5996adc77dc606944dbc0dc682bff104cd38cc1bec19253444cb87f259797  # [win]

build:
  number: 1
  skip: True  # [osx]

requirements:
  build:
    - 7zip  # [win]
  run:
    - fontconfig  # [linux]
    - xorg-libxrender  # [linux]
    - xorg-libxext  # [linux]
    - vc >=14  # [win]

test:
  commands:
    - wkhtmltopdf -h

about:
  home: http://wkhtmltopdf.org/
  license: LGPL-3.0-or-later
  license_family: GPL
  license_file: '{{ environ["RECIPE_DIR"] }}/LICENSE'
  summary: 'Command line tools to render HTML into PDF and various image formats.'
  description: |
    wkhtmltopdf and wkhtmltoimage are open source (LGPLv3) command line tools
    to render HTML into PDF and various image formats using the Qt WebKit rendering engine.

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - scopatz

about.description:
wkhtmltopdf and wkhtmltoimage are open source (LGPLv3) command line tools
to render HTML into PDF and various image formats using the Qt WebKit rendering engine.
about.summary: Command line tools to render HTML into PDF and various image formats.
